======================================================================
PAGE: Tormented Spirit
CATEGORIES: Unique monsters
URL: https://pathofexile.fandom.com/wiki/Tormented_Spirit
======================================================================

Tormented Cannibal
Tormented Spirits
are the spirits of tormented criminals that yield their ill-gotten gains when slain. Eager to protect their trove, these spirits flee when encountered and imbue nearby monsters with dangerous powers, which improves their item drops. It's also possible for spirits to possess rare and unique enemies, greatly increasing their threat (and value) to treasure-seeking exiles.
The various spirits have differing modifiers that they themselves possess as a spirit, in addition to effects that they bestow on normal and magic monsters that they touch, as well as a powerful modifier that they grant to any rare or unique mobs that they possess (a single monster can be possessed by more than one spirit). Any mob that is bestowed or possessed by a spirit gains a modifier (Spirit's Touch/Grip) based on the spirit that bestowed them, in addition to some slight increase to movement, attack and cast speeds, as well as significantly increased
IIQ
and
IIR
. Modifiers are shown in
green
.
If a tormented spirit is killed, it is guaranteed to drop one rare item. If a rare monster is possessed, at least two rare items are guaranteed to drop, and if a unique monster is possessed, at least three rare items are guaranteed to drop.
A Tormented Spirit that is not killed and does not find a monster to possess will eventually break its bonds and vanish, leaving no items. Spirits that do possess a monster will not vanish.

Version history
Version
Changes
3.7.0
Added 3 new Tormented Spirits, found via
Sextants
.
2.4.0
Tormented Spirits can now only touch up to 50 monsters each. The technical issues caused by "vacuum farming" are causing too many problems for us and we have unfortunately had to disable this playstyle. This will improve server performance for everyone.
Tormented Spirits can no longer possess
Vagan
, because sometimes he cannot die.
Fixed a bug where Tormented Spirits could still drop items when they expire or when they possess monsters (without being directly
killed
).
2.3.0
Tormented Spirits now more strongly want to possess monsters rather than flee from you.
2.0.4
Monsters can no longer be touched by multiple Tormented Spirits. Rare and Unique monsters can still be possessed by more than one Spirit.
2.0.2c
Monsters that are touched by Tormented Spirits now have smaller bonuses to item quantity and rarity.
Monsters that are possessed by Tormented Spirits now have larger bonuses to item quantity and rarity.
2.0.2
Tormented Spirits now only flee from Players (as opposed to also fleeing from their minions).
2.0.0
Tormented Spirits have been added to the core game.
The Torment spirit Tormented Martyr has been made significantly less dangerous.
1.3.1
Tormented Spirits are now substantially more inclined to possess a monster when one is in range.
1.3.0h
Tormented Spirits are now more common in end-game maps.
1.3.0
Introduced to the game.

Undying Archivist
located in
The Archives
. They can summon multiple Book Tornadoes, a spell in the form of a whirlwind that periodically deals physical damage in an area of effect. They have the ability
Far Shot
, meaning that their skills do more damage at long range.
Map variants

The Arbiter of Knowledge
, can be found in the

======================================================================
PAGE: Tsoagoth, The Brine King
CATEGORIES: Act 6 unique monsters, Boss monsters, Bosses
URL: https://pathofexile.fandom.com/wiki/Tsoagoth,_The_Brine_King
======================================================================

"The Brine King" redirects here. For quest, see
The Brine King (quest)
.
Tsoagoth, The Brine King
Tsoagoth, The Brine King
Location(s)
The Brine King's Reef
Quest(s)
The Brine King
Resistance(s)
Resists
Elemental Damage
Resists
Chaos Damage
Skill(s)
Tide Rush
Upheaval
Slam
Charge
Tsoagoth, The Brine King
is the final boss of
act 6
, located in
the Brine King's Reef
.
Lore
The Brine King
is the god for the sailors according to
Bestel
.
Tsoagoth
is its Azmerian name.
Weylam Roth
called it
Lord of Salt and Scale
.
According to his granddaughter,
Lilly Roth
, the pirates carry ritual on full moon such as human sacrifice.
Quest
Defeating him is part of the main quest
The Brine King
.
Strategy
Tsoagoth is a challenging boss to strategize for, as his abilities intentionally remove the option of kiting (running out of damage zones) from the player. This boss acts as a stat check on your build. If you do not have enough lightning resistance and cold resistance, you are highly likely to die from a one-shot by a combination of lightning strikes and orbs of water. In order to deal with this, it is critical to max out your lightning and cold resistances by temporarily equipping a
Topaz Ring
or
Topaz Flask
and
Sapphire Ring
or
Sapphire Flask
, in addition to having at least 1000 health and appropriate life
flasks
Abilities
The stage and abilities change as the fight progresses.
At 100% health
Slam
Tsoagoth raises his claw and whacks the ground, creating a medium-ranged shockwave.
Tidal Rush
Tsoagoth enters a defensive stance for 5 seconds, gaining 80% damage reduction, and damaging nearby enemies. During this period, Tsoagoth is 40% slower, can only melee, and will constantly summon
Brinespawn
.
At 75% health
Flood Arena (1)
Upon reaching 75% health, Tsoagoth shrinks the arena with tidal waves. He is untargetable while the stage is shrinking. Tidal waves apply a debuff
Tidal Wave
on contact. For the duration, lightning will strike the ground, while orbs of water come out of the waves. Even after the effect ends, orbs of water will continue to come out of the waves. The arena returns to a larger size, although smaller than it was originally.
At 50% health
Flood Arena (2)
Upon reaching 50% health, Tsoagoth shrinks the arena again, more than before. This time, however, lightning does not strike the ground, and there are no orbs of water.
Cleave
Tsoagoth is capable of attacking in an arc. It applies the
Maim
status, reducing movement speed by 30% for 4 seconds.
At 25% health
Flood Arena (3)
Upon reaching 25% health, Tsoagoth shrinks the arena yet again, and more than the previous time. In this final phase of the fight, Tsoagoth will no longer use Tidal Rush. Instead of orbs of water, lightning will constantly strike the ground in random places until the end.
Divination cards
The following
divination cards
can drop from this monster:
Video
Map variants
Nassar, Lion of the Seas in
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
.
Version history
Version
Changes
3.0.0
Added to the game

======================================================================
PAGE: Tukohama, Karui God of War
CATEGORIES: Act 5 unique monsters, Boss monsters, Bosses
URL: https://pathofexile.fandom.com/wiki/Tukohama,_Karui_God_of_War
======================================================================

Tukohama, Karui God of War
Tukohama, Karui God of War
Quest(s)
The Father of War
Resistance(s)
Resists
Elemental Damage
Resists
Chaos Damage
Skill(s)
Ground Slam
Summon Flare Totem
Summon Molten Ball Totem
Summon Barrier Totem
Tukohama, Karui God of War
is a minor god and optional boss in
act 6
and can be found in the arena in
The Karui Fortress
. Tukohama is the first god a player may encounter and defeating him award the player with their first
pantheon
power and one passive point from
Tarkleigh
.
Quest
Defeating him is part of the quest
The Father of War
.
Strategy
While slightly less dangerous than both Act V bosses, Tukohama is still a powerful enemy. As soon as the fight begins, he will summon an invulnerable totem which will continuously casting
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
as it turns both clock and counterclockwise. The player should be constantly mindful of Tukohama's powerful melee attacks as well as the Scorching Ray as they maneuver around the arena.
Once the boss' health reaches a certain threshold, he will summon four protective totems, which will make him invulnerable until all of them are destroyed. Being the first boss fight following their occurrence, players should also be mindful of the resistance penalty incurred after the events of
Act 5
.

Version History
Version
Changes
3.9.0
Monster resistances throughout the game have been reviewed and made more consistent. In many cases this has resulted in more resistances on monsters.
3.6.0
Bosses which previously had 60% or 80% less effect of curses on them now have 33% or 66% less effect of curses on them respectively. This includes map bosses, Incursion architects, Betrayal targets,
Breachlords
, Shaper, Elder and others.
2.5.0
Introduced to the game.

CATEGORIES: Boss monsters, Map bosses

======================================================================

Uber Elder
Uber Elder
Level(s)
84
Location(s)
The Shaper's Realm

Elder: 48 096 435

Shaper: 1.76

50%

Cold

30%
Chaos

66% Less Curse Effectiveness
Cannot Be Fully Slowed
Cannot be stunned while stunned
Cannot be stunned for 4s after stun finished
etc.
For lower level version of the Elder, see
The Elder
.
I saw the fabric of creation in its most primordial form. I felt the templars grip loosen and slip away. I lay there, in the emptiness between worlds, for an eternity. Then, for the first time in my life, I truly awoke.
The Shaper
The
Uber Elder
is a dual boss encounter where the player fights both
the Elder
and
the Shaper
at the same time. It is the final boss encounter in the
War for the Atlas
expansion. However, that end-game storyline was retired and replaced by the
Conquerors of the Atlas
. According to the
Conquerors of the Atlas
game lore, the Elder was slain by the
Elderslayers
led by
Sirus, Awakener of Worlds
, and was removed from the Atlas. Players can still fight Uber Elder using the
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
map fragments
, but do not need to chase the Elder and Shaper across the Atlas anymore. These map fragments can be obtained by defeating
the Shaper
and
the Elder
.
The Uber Elder is considered to be one of the most difficult boss encounters in Path of Exile, as players are pitted against both
The Elder
and
The Shaper
simultaneously. Players must be very careful to place the Shaper's
Vortex portals
around the edges of the arena failing which the entire arena will littered with permanent vortices that cause heavy
damage over time
. Players have to also avoid the Elder's Ring of Death and the Shaper Beam and Projectiles, all of which can be deadly if not dealt with properly.
The encounter has no phases, however, one of the bosses will be invulnerable, and this will alternate between the two bosses every time the player damages the vulnerable boss for 25% of his health.
Zana Caeserius
does not assist the player during this fight, unlike both the Elder and the Shaper encounters where she is present and provides various defensive abilities.
The Uber Elder can drop one of the most valuable items in the game, a 3-mod
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
with highly variable value depending on the random mods it has, being worth potentially hundreds of
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
s if its 3 mods work extremely well together. Such items are highly valuable because they are unique, cannot be duplicated or replicated, and cannot be crafted by players.
Entry
Players must use the following fragments in their map device to fight Uber Elder (Elder and Shaper). These fragments can be obtained by defeating
The Shaper
and
The Elder
, and can also be traded amongst players.
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
- obtained by defeating
The Shaper
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
- obtained by defeating
The Shaper
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
- obtained by defeating
The Elder
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
- obtained by defeating
The Elder
The arena is the same as the
Absence of Value and Meaning
, but the character first enters
The Shaper's Realm
, and then takes a portal to the final arena. The arena and staging areas are in the same instance.
Recommendations
The following is recommended:
Mastery of the mechanics of
The Elder
and
The Shaper
(fight both of them independently till you can do it
deathless
)
At least 10 million damage per second (rolling over your main attack ability should show 100K+, because Path of Exile cannot calculate DPS properly)
A method to increase damage against unique enemies (such as
Assassin's Mark
for
critical strike
-based builds)
Capped elemental resistances (fire, cold and lightning resistance at 75%)
At least 8,000
Effective hit points
(
Life
pool)
High
life regeneration
or energy shield regeneration to combat the Shaper Beam and Vortex portals
At least 20% block or evade chance, or
Mana before Life
defenses
The following is optional:
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
can increase your defensive ability if you keep dying (spellcaster and ranger builds only)
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
can increase your defensive ability if you keep dying (melee builds only)
Attacks
The Elder is assisted by the Shaper in this battle. The battle essentially pits the player against both bosses, with some differences:
One of the bosses will be invulnerable, alternating between the two for every 25% health lost. The invulnerable boss will use less attacks than normal. When both bosses are at 25% health, both bosses will be vulnerable.
Volatile Anomalies
and
Madness Propagators
will continuously spawn during the fight, alternating every 20 seconds.
There are no special phases from either boss.
At each 1/4 health lost from both bosses, the Elder or Shaper will spawn additional monsters.
The Elder will summon multiple
Null Portals
The Shaper channels a monster portal like in his regular fight. Both are invulnerable during this phase.
The Elder does not use his
Super Siphon
attack or the debuff
Crystalised Fear
The Shaper does not use his
Shadow Clone
or Bullet Hell attack.
The Elder
Image
Attack
Details
Used while invulnerable?
Default Melee Attack
The Elder strikes the player, dealing Physical Damage.
Yes
Ice Spears 1
The Elder fires multiple sets of 2 icy projectiles
Each projectile that hits the player deals 5006 to 7509 Cold Damage
Yes
Ice Spears 2
The Elder fires 4 icy projectiles at once
Each projectile that hits the player deals 5006 to 7509 Cold Damage
Yes
Ice Spears 3
The Elder charges up an attack and then fires 5+ icy projectiles
Each projectile that hits the player deals 6554 to 9832 Cold Damage
Yes
Siphon
The Elder dives into the ground and reappears, siphoning energy out of the player within a 180 degree cone around himself
Players must stay out of the range of the siphon to escape the attack
If players are within the siphoning attack area:
Deals 1433 Physical Damage per second as debuff
Fed Upon
Players have 60% less
Action speed
while inside as debuff
Sprouting Madness
, greatly slowing their movement
All damage dealt to the player is gained as the Elder's
energy shield
No
Tentacle Slam
The Elder spawns several tentacles around the player that slam the ground to deal
Area of effect
Physical damage
This attack also leaves visual ground effect for a short time
Each tentacle that hits the player deals 130% of Damage
No
Expanding Nova /
Ring of Death
The Elder casts a ring around him, creating a field that gradually grows larger over time
After several seconds, it explodes dealing massive physical damage, enough to kill most builds
Players must stay within the inner ring until the attack ends in order to survive
If players are outside the ring, it deals 5420 to 6625 Physical Damage when it explodes
It is the only one-shot mechanic
Yes
Rising Slam
The Elder spins around, launching multiple cold damage projectiles that impact in a ring around him, then teleports away.
He will then teleport to your location and do a slam that deals heavy cold damage.
No
The Shaper
Image
Attack
Details
Used while invulnerable?
Default Attack
The Shaper lashes out at the player, dealing
Physical
damage
He only uses it while in melee range.
If the player is hit, it deals:
Deals 100% of Damage
33% more Attack Speed
Yes
Shaper Beam
The Shaper unleashes an extremely powerful beam that deals heavy damage over time if the player is hit by it
The Shaper fires the beam aiming at the player, and once fired, the beam does NOT rotate to target the player
The player must dash away or run away from the beam area to avoid taking damage
The beam can kill most builds in 1-2 seconds if they stand within the beam constantly
The beam lasts for 3 seconds
If players touch it, the beam does ALL of the following:
Deals 5384
Fire
Damage per second
Deals 4405
Cold
Damage per second
Deals 6057
Lightning
Damage per second
Yes
Projectiles
The Shaper fires 3 golden orbs consecutively, dealing massive cold damage if it hits the player.
Each ball will deal:
Deals 5639 to 8458
Cold
Damage
Damage Penetrates 25%
Cold Resistance
Yes
Teleport Slam
The Shaper disappears into the void, and teleports to the player and slams the ground, dealing heavy damage that can one-shot most builds.
To avoid this attack:
Players must notice that the Shaper has disappeared and maintain constant movement
When the Shaper reappears at the player's location he will perform the Slam attack
If players were moving, they would have moved from their original location and avoided the attack
If players are anywhere within the purple circle, they will be dealt heavy damage:
Deals 300% of Damage
50% less Attack Speed
No
Vortex
The Shaper fires a slow-moving grey ball that seeks the player
Once the ball touches the player, it will create a vortex on the ground, that deals heavy cold damage over time if players stand within it
Players must attract the balls to the edges of the arena to prevent the vortex from restricting the player's mobility
Each vortex lasts for the duration of the entire fight, thus players must be very careful to attract them to the edges of the arena
To escape a vortex:
Players must immediately blink or run from it and continue attacking from another direction
If the Elder or Shaper is surrounded by portals, simply wait till he relocates or till some of the portals disappear
Unknown
Monster Portal
The Shaper teleports to the side of the arena and opens a monster portal while he becomes immune to damage
The monster portal will spawn various kinds of shaped monsters, one at a time, who will exit the portal and attack the player
Players must simply kill the monsters
Video guide
Items found from this monster
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageID"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
If a Watcher's Eye drops, it will have 3 mods. The mods are random; it is possible to obtain a Watcher's Eye with 3 mods for the same aura skill (extremely valuable), as well as 3 mods for 3 different skills (less valuable).
It can also drop
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
, even if
The Maven
is not present and observing the fight.
Version history
Version
Changes
3.9.0
The Elder and Shaper were defeated by
Sirus
and the Elderslayers and are no longer part of the Atlas.
Players no longer have to chase the Elder and the Shaper across the atlas in order to fight them.
The fight can now be accessed using the
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
map fragment
set.
3.2.0
Introduced the final Elder encounter. This endgame encounter is the single most difficult challenge Path of Exile currently has to offer. Good luck!
No longer immune to Taunt, though they may not retarget based on being taunted. The Elder in his Unstable phase can no longer be slowed below their base speed.
The Elder's Unstable phase is now more difficult, and can drop more Elder items if successfully completed. This is now the only way to obtain the Watcher's Eye unique jewel.

PAGE: Ululat, Maggot-Bearer

Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "COUNT(DISTINCT events._pageName)"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
Talismans are infused with the power of the First Ones, the primeval gods of the ancient Ezomytes. The creatures of Wraeclast are instinctively drawn to these relics and the feral vigour they impart.
Description on the official Path of Exile website
The
Talisman leagues
were a pair of
challenge leagues
, one standard and the other hardcore. In these leagues, monsters are possessed by ancient Ezomyte
Talismans
. These monsters are indicated by green Talisman symbols over their heads. The Talismans grant them additional strength and properties in battle. Killing one of these monsters allows the player to claim its Talisman for himself.
The standard and hardcore versions have the same core mechanics but slightly different items available.
The leagues started on December 11, 2015 along with the release of
Version 2.1.0
and ended March 4, 2016.
Characters that died in standard Talisman league respawned in the standard Talisman league, while those that died in hardcore Talisman league respawned in
Standard league
. At the end of the Talisman leagues, all characters and
stashes
were moved to Standard league and
Hardcore league
.
Modifier
All areas had:
Ancient Talismans possess monsters throughout Wraeclast
Items
Talismans
Main page:
Talisman
Talismans are a type of
amulet
. All talismans are
corrupted
when dropped, so they cannot be modified. They have special implicit modifiers more powerful than ordinary amulets and can be normal, magic, rare, or unique. For the full list of talismans possession effects and other related information, see
Talisman
.
Shared between HC and SC

article for details.

======================================================================
PAGE: Vaal Oversoul
CATEGORIES: Act 2 unique monsters, Boss monsters, Bosses
URL: https://pathofexile.fandom.com/wiki/Vaal_Oversoul
======================================================================

Vaal Oversoul
Vaal Oversoul
Location(s)
The Ancient Pyramid
Quest(s)
Shadow of the Vaal
Resistance(s)
Resists
Elemental Damage
Resists
Chaos Damage
Skill(s)
Lightning Beam
Ice Shards
Slam
Summon monsters
Hide
Quake
Vaal Oversoul
is the final boss of
Act 2
, located on the top floor of the
Ancient Pyramid
.
One must use
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
, or the complete amulet from the quest
Deal with the Bandits
in the
Dark Altar
in order to summon it.
Defeating it opens the way to
Act 3
's
City of Sarn
.
Strategy
Vaal Oversoul casting its lightning beam.
The best counter to its powerful attacks is good mobility. Always pay attention to its movements and see which arm it is using. A good way to avoid sudden spike damage (beam & slam) is to back off and start moving before the cycle of its current ability has finished. This way you are in a safe position to counter its next choice of ability.
The longer, thinner fork arm shoots lightning beams and ice shards. Dodging the lightning beams is important, as it causes
Shock
on hit, causing you to take 50% increased damage. Having maximum
Lightning Resistance
at this point is a good safety net, even though the shots are very easy to dodge with simple circling maneuvers. You should try to stay away from the ground ice as it slows down both your movespeed and attack/cast speed, weakening your position considerably.
The bigger ball arm is used for the quake and slam abilities. The slam is slow and relatively easy to dodge. Having very high
Armour
and
fire resistance
can help you survive a hit. However, trying to tank it is generally a bad idea as the damage may be unsurvivable for weaker builds. The falling rocks are relatively hard to dodge if they happen to fall near you due to the short time frame you're given to react. A small, non-damaging rock will indicate the location where a bigger rock will fall shortly after.
The rocks are more likely to fall further away from Vaal Oversoul, but there's no place guaranteed to be safe.
The third arm is used to summon monsters. The ranged monsters it summons deal high
physical damage
and
chaos damage
. The melee monsters are slow and can inflict
elemental status effects
on hit. A good time to take care of them quickly is when the boss hasn't yet reappeared. While taking care of the monsters, it's a good idea to be ready for when the boss reappears as it can sometimes almost immediately start its next choice of ability. The summoning cycle can be repeated immediately if enough of the summoned monsters have died before the end of the cycle.
Causing the boss to get stunned, while extremely hard to execute considering its life pool, can interrupt its current ability and initiate the next one. The boss can generally repeat most of the abilities multiple times back to back.
When fighting the boss as melee, it is a good idea to play it very safe, as you are extremely vulnerable to its slam attack. The safest time to attack is when Vaal is summoning monsters, as that phase lasts a decent amount of time. It is also possible to attack when Vaal is shooting ice shards, but the duration of this attack is generally shorter. Try not to approach the boss when it teleports near a wall or corner. Not only is your view of the battlefield obstructed, but you also have fewer avenues of escape.
When attempting to tank the slam attack (again, extremely inadvisable), your
life
pool will matter much less than your fire and physical resistance stats. Using as many
Endurance Charges
as possible + high
armor
will propel you to very high physical reduction; having 75%
fire resistance
will remove 30%-40% of the total damage. This will generally prove ineffective, however, given that the sheer amount of
physical damage
dealt will still probably kill you due to
armor
effectiveness scaling.
As ranged, it is important to instantly start moving when he changes his weapon, because if he chooses the Lightning Beam, this can be a deadly strike and it is cast almost instantly after choosing this weapon. Also when he disappears, you should start to move around after a short period of time before he reappears, because it is possible that he chooses the lightning beam instantly which will be fired very quickly after, barely leaving reaction time.
Abilities
Skill
Effect
Damage
Lightning Beam
Fires a lightning beam with a 100% chance to cause
Shock
on hit. One cycle contains 3 shots.
Ice Shards
Shoots ice shards that spread ground ice on the floor, causing the players walking on it to become
chilled
.
Slam
A powerful slam to the ground, dealing massive damage in an area (50%
Physical
, 50%
Fire
) with increased
critical chance
.
Summoning
Summons monsters.
Hide
Hides in the ground for several seconds and then emerges in a different location. Triggered after the cycle of summoning monsters.
Quake
Causes rocks to fall from the ceiling in a random pattern, dealing high
physical damage
in a small area.

Name

Defence Against the Darkness
Land the killing blow on the Vaal Oversoul while you have the
Fortify
Buff active.

Vaal Oversoul
serve as map bosses:

Version history
Version
Changes
2.3.0
Fixed a bug where the Vaal Oversoul's skills didn't work properly if you were inside him.
2.1.0
Fixed a variety of bugs where the Vaal Oversoul could get into states where he would not target close enemies.
2.0.2
Vaal Oversoul can no longer be stunned while using his submerge and emerge skill.
1.1.5
Fixed a case where the Vaal Oversoul could get out of sync when doing a Vaal Smash.
1.1.0
The Vaal Oversoul's Smash is now fully considered an attack. It can now be evaded or blocked, but cannot be spell blocked.
1.0.0
Item drops from
Merveil
,
Brutus
, Vaal Oversoul,
Piety
and
Dominus
have been substantially increased in Cruel and Merciless difficulties.
0.11.4
Improvements have been made to the lead-up music of the Vaal Oversoul fight.
0.11.0e
Fixed an instance crash related to the Vaal Oversoul.
0.11.0d
Fixed a bug where the Vaal Oversoul's life bar was visible when it was hidden.
0.10.0
Fixed a bug where the Vaal Oversoul could emerge inside walls.
0.9.13
The Merveil, Brutus and Vaal Oversoul fights now lock the door behind you for the duration of the fight, so that players aren't able to retreat to the linked area. Portals are still allowed.
0.9.12v
Fixed a bug where raising the Vaal Oversoul's corpse after he dies would prevent you leaving the area.
0.9.12n
Players are now unable to exit the
Vaal Pyramid
(after slaying the Oversoul) until it has completed its ascent into Sarn.
0.9.12k
Reduced the damage that the Vaal Oversoul's laser attack does.
Changed the Vaal Oversoul's slam attack to be half physical damage (it was entirely fire damage before). Reduced its overall damage by around 10%.
0.9.12h
Fixed a problem where the Vaal Oversoul would use the wrong arms for its attacks.
0.9.12g
Added some new music for the Vaal Oversoul boss fight.
0.9.12
There's now a quest to kill the Vaal Oversoul.
Boss video

Version history
Version
Changes
3.9.0
Monster resistances throughout the game have been reviewed and made more consistent. In many cases this has resulted in more resistances on monsters.
3.8.0
Vagan now awards various
Legion
-related items in Betrayal Safehouses. In Transportation Safehouses he awards Legion Splinters. In Research he awards Incubators. In Intervention he awards Legion Scarabs. In Fortification he awards a set of chests that can be found in Legion encounters.
3.6.0
(not in patch notes) Minimum area level to encounter Vagan has changed to Act 9 onwards.
Bosses which previously had 60% or 80% less effect of curses on them now have 33% or 66% less effect of curses on them respectively. This includes map bosses, Incursion architects,
Betrayal targets
, Breachlords, Shaper, Elder and others.
Vagan's Chests in all Jobs now give more and better items.
Several veiled modifiers now have fewer tiers. Low tiers contribute more towards unlocking higher tiers, however it will, on average, take more unveils to unlock the highest tier.
3.5.0
Introduced to the game. Replaced
Vagan, Weaponmaster
References

======================================================================
PAGE: Veritania, the Redeemer
CATEGORIES: Boss monsters, Map bosses
URL: https://pathofexile.fandom.com/wiki/Veritania,_the_Redeemer
======================================================================

Veritania, the Redeemer
Veritania, the Redeemer
Location(s)
Redeemer's Eyrie
Quest(s)
The Redeemer
Resistance(s)
50%
Fire
50%
Cold
50%
Lightning
30%
Chaos
Modifier(s)
Cannot Be Fully Slowed
Veritania, the Redeemer
is one of the Elderslayers /
Conquerors
of the Atlas. She serves as one of the end-game bosses of the Atlas. The boss fight itself has 10 different difficulty levels, based on the player's current Atlas Awakening level and the number of socketed watchstone on that region's watchstone altar. It is colloquially known as
A0 Veritania
through
A9 Veritania
.
Items influenced by the Redeemer have a blue icon on its header
and have unique
Redeemer modifiers
.
Non-influenced items can have the Redeemer's influence added using a
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
, which is a rare drop from Veritania.
Each Atlas region except
The Uncharted Realms
, has a
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
. Defeating Veritania in that region for the first time will drop a
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
that can be socketed into
Atlas citadels
. Note that Conquerors have specific sequence to spawn, namely in corner region without watchstone, and then required to socket 1/2/3/4 number of watchstones in that region.
Encounter
Players must first spawn a Conqueror within the Atlas using the steps in the
Atlas quick guide
. Then talking to Kirac and Zana will open a portal to the Conqueror's citadel. Defeating the map boss will open a portal to the Conqueror's arena, where they must fight Veritania.
Veritania's arena is known as the Redeemer's Eyrie. Vaal charges will be carried over to the arena.
Tips
Veritania is notable for dealing a high amount of
Cold
damage, and is also the only Conqueror to deal this type of damage.
When Veritania begins casting a tornado, players must stay within the eye of the storm to survive
Touching the edges of the tornado storm will result in high amounts of Cold damage taken and can be deadly.
Staying close to Veritania and attacking her is the best strategy for this battle.

Deals 343% of Damage

Deals 1252 to 1878 Cold Damage

Deals 1565 to 2348 Cold Damage

Deals 343% of Damage

Base duration is 4 seconds

Deals 1051 to 1577 Cold Damage
200% increased Freeze Duration on enemies

Deals 343% of Damage
Deals 200% of Base Attack Damage
Sparks
Launches unpredictable sparks that move randomly until they hit an enemy or expire.

Lore
Main page:
Veritania's journals
Veritania's journals are clickable lore items dropped each time you defeat Veritania.
From
Zana
:
When I met her, Veritania was a paradox. She was quiet and reserved to the point of reclusiveness, yet she seemed to feel compelled to help others by a humanistic moral code she'd profess by the campfire. Before, she took care of the hungry, the down-on-their-luck, the homeless, the addicted, and the enslaved alike. She was, in fact, exiled for her charity work... helping one too many mistreated Maraketh or Karui made powerful people in Oriath very angry.
As we explored the Atlas, Veritania's mind became an invaluable resource. Thanks to her, we were able to stretch our limited resources farther than I could've possibly hoped, avoiding fruitless confrontations and conserving our strength for moments that mattered most. She'd see a bad situation coming sooner than anyone, and help steer us away from it.
But her mind, like the others, soon broke beneath the weight of the Atlas, and the once-merciful Veritania became contemptuous of all we encountered. It was impossible for anyone but Drox to meet her increasingly high standards. She broke away from the group not long after we left him. The last time I saw her, she accused me of using the mysteries of Atlas as a drug to distract myself from the loss of my father. After that barb, you can imagine I'm not too eager to see her again.
See also
Sirus, Awakener of Worlds
Al-Hezmin, the Hunter
Baran, the Crusader
Drox, the Warlord
Eyrie Apparition Effect
, cosmetic effect derived from in-game
apparition
of Veritania

Vic Vox
Vic Vox

Vic Vox
and

are the two bosses of the unique Heist:
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
, which is the last contract in the questline of

.
Items found from this monster
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageID"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
Lore
Vic Vox was involved in a plot regarding the
O' Eternal
, a first-edition book written by Victario, a legendary poet. The book was in the Vox family possession for decades.
Kurai, the Administrator
stole the book for a client, and thus forced Vic Vox to declare war on her. Vic Vox demands that Kurai give her the head of the player as compensation. Kurai refuses, and in revenge Vic Vox kidnaps her cat Hana, and eventually kills the cat. In the final contract
Contract: The Twins
, Kurai and the player defeats both Vic Vox and
Vinny Vox
in a battle.
According to Vic Vox, his parents were so font of the poet Victario, they named him after him. Thus his full name is revealed to be Victario Vox.
Playthrough
Monster stats
Error: invalid field alias "monsters.tags"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes.
Trivia
Although not confirmed by any official sources, it is likely that the names Vic Vox and Vinny Vox are an intentional reference to the characters
Vic Vega
and
Vincent Vega
from
Quentin Tarantino
's films
Reservoir Dogs
and
Pulp Fiction
, who are also canonically brothers. Vinny is short for Vincent.
Version history
Version
Changes

Introduced to the game.

Version history
Version
Changes
3.13.1e
Fixed a bug where certain map bosses could sometimes fail to transition to their next phase if they were frozen.
3.10.2b
Fixed a rare bug where Visceris in the Overgrown Ruin map could become immune to damage.
3.9.0
Monster resistances throughout the game have been reviewed and made more consistent. In many cases this has resulted in more resistances on monsters.
3.8.2
Fixed a rare bug that prevented various bosses from using skills or transitioning correctly after being Frozen or Stunned.
3.6.0
Bosses which previously had 60% or 80% less effect of curses on them now have 33% or 66% less effect of curses on them respectively. This includes map bosses, Incursion architects, Betrayal targets, Breachlords, Shaper, Elder and others.
3.1.0
The entire Atlas has been reworked. Many map names have changed, as have their balance, tier and position on the Atlas. Many maps have also had their boss fights swapped or completely reworked.
(not in patch note) Visceris became the new boss of
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
.

======================================================================
PAGE: Voll, Emperor of Purity
CATEGORIES: Act 4 unique monsters, Boss monsters, Bosses
URL: https://pathofexile.fandom.com/wiki/Voll,_Emperor_of_Purity
======================================================================

Not to be confused with
Vaal
.
Voll, Emperor of Purity
Voll, Emperor of Purity
Location(s)
The Dried Lake
Quest(s)
Breaking the Seal
Resistance(s)
Resists
Elemental Damage
Resists
Chaos Damage
Voll, Emperor of Purity
is a unique monster located in
The Dried Lake
.
Quest
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
is acquired after defeating him.
Lore
High Templar Voll of Thebrus was the leader of the
Purity Rebellion
, a crusade to eliminate all Gemlings and thaumuturgists from the Eternal Empire and create a new nation of theocracy in its place. Voll had enlisted many Eternal historical figures to his cause, including
Victario
,
Ondar
, and
Archbishop Geofri
, as well as leaders of other nations, including
King Kaom
of
Karui
,
Thane Rigwald
of Ezomyr, and Sekhema
Deshret
of
Maraketh
. Voll was successful in his campaign, having Emperor Chitus assassinated and burning many thaumuturgists at the stake, including
Maligaro
and
Doedre
.
However, before he could execute Chitus's thaumuturgist
Malachai
, Malachai offered "the end to thaumuturgy" in exchange for his life. Voll spared Malachai, a decision he would come to regret.
Voll's reign as Emperor was short, and he and his Empire were destroyed by the Cataclysm.
Some artifacts relating to his involvement in the Purity Rebellion are present in modern Wraeclast, within the Phrecian Forests of
Act 2
and in the Library of
Act 3
. Some of these items of
environmental lore
record proclamations made by Voll during that time.
Map variants
The Brittle Emperor
Planus, Hollow Soul
(removed)

Change 1-6 sockets of an item to a white socket. (Must have no white socket and not be corrupted.)
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
Strategy
When turning sockets white, you're more likely to get the result you want if the color of socket you want to turn white is the most frequent color of socket. For example, if your item has sockets BBBBGG, and you want BBBBGW, a one-socket bench has only a 1/3 chance of hitting a green socket. On the other hand, if you color the item to BBBBBG first, you have a 5/6 chance of turning a blue socket white and getting BBBBGW.

======================================================================
PAGE: Warband
CATEGORIES: Unique monsters
URL: https://pathofexile.fandom.com/wiki/Warband
======================================================================

For the league, see
Warbands league
.
Warbands
are elemental-themed unique packs of monsters. They were originally introducted during the
Warbands league
but were not added to the core game when the league ended. Warbands are still available through other means, such as
Zana's map device
,
prophecies
, certain
Delve
nodes, and certain maps such as
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
,
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
,
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
and
Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
.
Tiers
This section addresses how Warbands functioned in the original Warbands league. This is not applicable on the current leagues.
Warbands Map Graph
Warbands are separated into four tiers. The tier of a zone determines what kind of monsters can spawn. Tier 4 allows for the toughest warbands (the bosses) while tier 1 only spawns the weakest.
The current tier of the zone could be found with two methods:
it would be shown with small dots next to circle of the map (2 pairs of 1 dot for tier 1, 2 pairs of 2 dots for tier 2 and so on).
there was a message on the map modifiers such as ("Captured by the Brinerot"); see the faction section below for details
Tier
Restrictions
1
Level 2+ Zones (Zones may have two dots, but it doesn't seem like Tier 2 units will spawn)
2
Level 10+ Zones
3
Level 41+ Zones (Cruel+)
4
Level 56+ Zones (Merciless)
In addition to those restrictions, zone level will also affect the number of potential warbands can spawn from each tier. At lower levels you'll only see 2 warbands, where as on 68+ zones up to 6 warbands can spawn in total.
Chaos Renegades, the fourth Warband faction, are hostile to both other Warbands and to exiles. They can only spawn in tier 4
map
areas.
The tier will be determined by the number of warband kills in a zone; every 10 minutes (60 minutes for maps) the zones with the most warband kills will have their warbands removed, while new warbands will appear elsewhere in world increasing the strength of warbands in adjecent zones.
Warbands will follow the regular world layout, for maps they follow a layout similar to the map upgrade path (see the graph).
Factions
Warbands are separated into four factions, each based on a damage type.

looking at the map; the map icons will have appropriately themed icons (i.e. lightning, fire, ice)
the mod in the upper right corner

Items
Any type of Warband member can drop items with special new magic mods or the unique shields. Tier three/four members can drop the unique boots. Tier four members can drop the unique rings.
Warbands mods
These
item affixes
only appear on
magic
items of the correct item type that drop from the respective Warband members. The item drops pre-identified. All Warband mods are prefixes.

Version history
Version
Changes
2.4.2
Warbands members now drop their signature items already identified.
2.0.4
The rate of spawning Warbands has been increased. It's now up to twice as high in some cases (such as leaders and Chaos Warbands).
2.0.1
Introduced the Chaos Warband Renegades.
Added three new Unique Items and some new weapon mods that can drop from the new Warband Renegades.
Warbands no longer leave footprints behind them.
2.0.0f
Fixed a bug where Warbands in Maps were using location information from Merciless instead of the correct Map information.
2.0.0g
There are now more fourth-tier Warbands throughout Merciless and Maps.
Increased the experience gained and the amount of items dropped by Warbands Grunts by 60% and Warbands Elites by 50%.
Warbands in Maps now change every hour rather than every half-hour, giving more opportunity to kill good ones.
The Chaos Leaders will rise up against the Warbands in content update 2.0.1.
2.0.0
Introduced to the game.

Unique versions

Version history
Version
Changes
3.5.0
The Atlas of Worlds has been shuffled. Most maps have changed tier and location within the Atlas.
Many map bosses have also shifted around. Some have been retired and replaced!
3.1.0
Added 32 new maps including two new Unique maps.
The entire Atlas has been reworked. Many map names have changed, as have their balance, tier and position on the Atlas. Many maps have also had their boss fights swapped or completely reworked.
The rules used to generate monsters in endgame maps have been significantly reworked and rebalanced around the rate at which we expect players to reliably clear out the map. In general, narrow, linear maps will contain fewer total monsters than maps with complex layouts. We will be closely monitoring and adjusting the balance of this change and expect to make further changes and improvements over time.
2.4.0
Added to the game.

Version history
Version
Changes
3.0.0
The Pale Council encounter has been rebalanced and is, in general, be more difficult. Defeating the Pale Council will earn you one of four new unique items exclusively available from them.

Introduced to the game.

Lua error: Error: invalid field alias "items._pageName"; aliases cannot contain dots or quotes..
In Izaro's grotesque little garden, you'll find an old friend of mine.
The yawning maw that is Yugul... but a self portrait of what that pathetic creature has come to believe about the nature of fear. Those who look upon him see their own fears reflected in his horrifying visage.
Sin
Yugul, Reflection of Terror
is a
unique monster
and a
minor god
located in
The High Gardens
in
Act 8
.
You will travel to
The High Gardens
which has no waypoint via
The Bath House
. Near the end of the gardens you will find
The Pools of Terror
wherein Yugul resides.
Upon defeating Yugul,
Hargan
will give you 1 Passive Skill Point. You will also gain
The Pantheon
power
Soul of Yugul
.
Lore
Vaal scholars seemed compelled to answer all manner of strange and troubling questions. Yugul was one such scholar. Whilst plumbing the depths of humanity, he came to believe that there was no truer expression of humanity than pure terror.
He would induce terror in children and then capture their reactions within eldritch mirrors, devices of his own creation that could petrify fear for extended study.
Through his gallery of reflected terror, Yugul came to understand human nature so well that he was able to manipulate his way into the Vaal halls of leadership, and eventually grew so feared and renowned that he ascended into godhood.
---
